match.userMessage:
Slow dolly forward on the hands as fingers twist the lipstick base, extending the coral bullet upward into a sharp beam of morning light that throws a pink reflection across the knuckles.
The twisting motion is precise and unhurried, with the bullet rising steadily under the directional sunlight.
Warm highlights glide across the metallic tube and skin while faint dust motes drift through the sunbeam.

soft morning room tone with distant birdsong. subtle lipstick mechanism twisting clicks.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
